1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":8313,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3760},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7267230869177205563","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"唯一让人眼前一亮，就是没有以往诸天对战流那么水，弹幕不多，这点不错。
其次对战斗的画面描写的很精彩，但也有缺点，剧情有些过于单一。
每本书有每本书的设定，我不做评价。虽然魔改了人物的具体事件，实力也有些模糊，但打斗剧情确实值得称赞。
系统有个最大的缺点，万界人物召唤而来，赢了没有一点奖励，而且还有死的可能，这点不好。没有奖励，战斗还有意义吗？而且还有死亡的风险。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1692034338,"group_id":"7263104620426169383","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"无","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyZYVuDzEgzvmduRRNashRJR8b5KjmL/SkNrFJnAgpRm","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b6f58e9de60f4b9ea97d5a92093544db~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776882997&x-signature=NItb9sm0%2Bgo7SRQ3Z19AyAjGoSc%3D","user_id":"1798446002210859","user_name":"沐倾仙"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1798446002210859","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1731815190,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7263104620426169383","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越到玄幻大陆，楚峰开局绑定了诸天万界武斗场系统！
